obligations.name: Battery passport
obligations.summary: LMT and industrial batteries >2 Wh must carry a digital battery passport via QR code.
obligations.gap: Battery passport required for LMT or industrial battery > 2 kWh.
obligations.action: Create QR/data-carrier battery passport before the deadline.

obligations.name: Battery removability (consumer)
obligations.summary: Portable and button-cell batteries in consumer/toy products must be user-removable.
obligations.gap: Battery must be user-removable and replaceable.
obligations.action: Redesign enclosure so the user can remove and replace the battery.

obligations.name: Carbon footprint declaration (EV / industrial)
obligations.summary: EV and industrial batteries must carry a carbon footprint declaration.
obligations.gap: Carbon footprint declaration required for EV or industrial battery.
obligations.action: Calculate and declare lifecycle carbon footprint per Annex II methodology.
